arts.ttl: Leeds United's injury nightmare continues as key man is forced off against Norwich City
arts.sum: Gruev's injury setback comes four days after club captain Ethan Ampadu suffered a serious knee ligament damage in United's home win over Coventry City. "It's a serious knee injury, he has damaged his lateral ligament - the doctors have recommended a conservative treatment so he doesn't need surgery," United boss Daniel Farke said.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Norwich City as Farke decides on Ampadu replacement plan
arts.sum: Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ao Tanaka, Ilia Gruev; Wilfried Gnonto, Brenden Aaronson, Largie Ramazani; Mateo Joseph. The selection means Firpo and Rodon are the only players still on for starting every match in all competitions this season for Leeds .

arts.ttl: Leeds scouting Port Vale talent Karl Agnero
arts.sum: Leeds United are one of multiple clubs in the top two divisions keeping a close eye on Port Vale’s teenage sensation Karl Agnero. According to a report from TEAMtalk, Leeds are monitoring the situation of Port Vale’s 16-year-old talent Karl Agnero.

arts.ttl: Discussion on Daniel Farke's Leeds United future underlined by three-team Championship detail
arts.sum: Two wins later and with Leeds back in a play-off place and boasting the opportunity to go top of the table this week after playing Norwich City tonight and then Sunderland on Friday night, confidence is bubbling away nicely and optimism is again on the rise. The fact only three sides are on a two-match winning run underlines the nature of this unrelenting division, and so when dropped points come, and they will, they need to be treated with a greater sense of reality.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City v Leeds United
arts.sum: Follow live updates and join the debate from Carrow Road as Norwich City face Leeds United in the Championship tonight.

arts.ttl: Leeds United can banish some Championship demons as key moment arrives
arts.sum: The Whites face fellow promotion hopefuls Norwich City and Sunderland over the course of the next five days, before a Yorkshire derby against Sheffield United after the October international break. Leeds United will be looking to make it three wins on the bounce for the first time this season when they face Norwich City tonight as they continue their bright start to the campaign.

arts.ttl: Leeds United, Stoke City and Norwich City make 'regular' transfer checks on League Two starlet
arts.sum: That is according to TEAMtalk, who claim the Whites, Stoke City and Norwich City are among a number of Premier League and Championship clubs tracking the all-action midfielder. Gray burst on to the scene last year, clocking up over 50 appearances as the Whites agonisingly missed out on promotion back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke could resolve new defensive nightmare with “outstanding” ex-PL free agent
arts.sum: Leeds United are short on defensive options right now after seeing Ethan Ampadu ruled out for 10 weeks, and Max Wöber undergo surgery on a meniscus injury. Leeds team news: Ethan Ampadu and Max Wöber suffer major setbacks
